basic_details.job_title: Vivekananda Kendra Paradip Refinery Hospital Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for GDMO, Medicine Specialists and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Vivekananda Kendra Paradip Refinery Hospital Medical Officers and Specialists Notification 2026 has been released on the official website vkendraprh.org. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Vivekananda Kendra Paradip Refinery Hospital Medical Officers and Specialists Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: General Duty Medical Officer: MBBS with internship and registration with Medical Council of India. Experience: At least One Year Post Qualification experience in a reputed Hospital/Nursing Home. Medicine Specialist: MD (Medicine). Experience: At least One Year Post Qualification experience as a Medicine Specialist in a reputed Hospital/Nursing Home. Pathology Specialist: MD (Pathology). Experience: At least One Year Post Qualification experience as a Pathologist in a reputed Hospital/Nursing Home. Pediatric Specialist: MD (Pediatrics). Experience: At least One Year Post Qualification experience as a Pediatrician in a reputed Hospital/Nursing Home. Consultant: MD/MS/DM/DNB in the respective specialty. Experience: At least One Year Post Qualification experience in a reputed Hospital/Nursing Home.

salary_details.details: General Duty Medical Officer: Rs. 1,10,500/- per month Medicine Specialist: Rs. 1,29,000/- per month Pathology Specialist: Rs. 1,29,000/- per month Pediatric Specialist: Rs. 1,29,000/- per month Consultant: Negotiable (Fee per visit)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Vivekananda Kendra Paradip Refinery Hospital Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Vivekananda Kendra Paradip Refinery Hospital Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Vivekananda Kendra Paradip Refinery Hospital Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Vivekananda Kendra Paradip Refinery Hospital recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Vivekananda Kendra Paradip Refinery Hospital recruitment is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How can I apply for the Medical Officers and Specialists posts?
faq.answer: You can apply by sending your application via email to the address specified in the official notification. Ensure all required documents are attached.

faq.question: Q3. What are the qualifications required for the General Duty Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the General Duty Medical Officer post, you need an MBBS degree with internship and registration with the Medical Council of India, along with at least one year of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Medicine, Pathology, and Pediatric Specialists is Rs. 1,29,000/- per month. For Consultants, the salary is negotiable based on the fee per visit.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies released?
faq.answer: A total of 5 vacancies have been released for Medical Officers and Specialists posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Vivekananda Kendra Paradip Refinery Hospital located?
faq.answer: The hospital is located in Paradip, Odisha.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information is https://www.vrmvk.org/.

faq.question: Q10. What is the age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The specific age limits are not detailed here; please refer to the official notification for exact age criteria and any applicable relaxations.
